commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

issues.description: The forecast section lacks a clear container or background differentiation from the main weather data, making it look slightly disconnected.
issues.fix: Wrap the forecast strip in a subtle, lighter-colored box or add a distinct background color to the bottom area.

issues.description: The card is purely static; adding hover interactions like a slight lift or scale would enhance perceived quality.
issues.fix: Add a transition effect on the Card component to animate slightly on hover.

issues.description: The weather icons lack ARIA labels, which may cause screen readers to read emojis unpredictably.
issues.fix: Add an aria-label attribute to the icon elements explaining the weather state (e.g., 'Icon representing sunny weather').

evaluations.critique: The component is clean, functional, and adheres well to the requirements using provided primitives. The visual hierarchy is solid, though the forecast section could benefit from more distinct visual separation from the main content. Overall, it's a very high-quality and concise implementation.

commit.name: Interactive Periodic Table
commit.description: CSS Grid periodic table with category coloring, search, and detail panel
commit.prompt:
Build an interactive periodic table of elements.

Layout:
- CSS Grid: 18 columns. Place each element using gridRow and gridColumn from its data.
- Each cell: symbol (large, centered), atomic number (small, top-left)
- Color-code by category using design tokens (e.g., noble-gas → one color, halogen → another)
- Search input at top — filters by name or symbol (case-insensitive)
- Click an element → detail panel below grid shows: name, symbol, atomicNumber, atomicWeight, category
- Legend showing each category with its color

All element data comes from props.elements. Use design system CSS variables.

issues.description: The element cells lack hover states or visual feedback indicating they are clickable, making discovery difficult.
issues.fix: Add a CSS hover state (e.g., scale or background highlight) to the Card component when in a clickable state.

issues.description: The interactive elements (cells) are implemented as <div> tags with onClick handlers without role='button' or keyboard accessibility.
issues.fix: Add 'role="button"', 'tabIndex={0}', and 'onKeyDown' handlers to the cell wrapper to support screen readers and keyboard navigation.

issues.description: The grid overflow behavior is basic; scrolling horizontally can hide the context of the Periodic Table.
issues.fix: Add a wrapper with better scroll indicators or ensure the container handles 18 columns gracefully without horizontal squishing.

evaluations.critique: The component is functional and well-structured, successfully implementing the requested grid layout and filtering logic. It would benefit significantly from adding proper ARIA roles and keyboard interaction support to the elements, as well as more defined hover states to improve user experience.

commit.name: Onboarding Wizard
commit.description: Multi-step onboarding flow with step indicator and validation
commit.prompt:
Build a 3-step onboarding wizard. Steps:

Step 1 - Profile Setup:
- Name input (required)
- Email input (required, validate email format)
- Avatar selection (choose from 4 emoji avatars)

Step 2 - Preferences:
- Role selection (dropdown: Developer, Designer, Manager, Other)
- Notification toggle (email notifications on/off)
- Theme preference (light/dark toggle)

Step 3 - Review & Confirm:
- Summary of all selections from steps 1-2
- "Go Back" button to edit
- "Complete Setup" button to submit

Requirements:
- Step indicator at top showing current step (1/2/3) with progress bar
- Back/Next navigation (Next disabled until required fields valid)
- Smooth transition between steps
- Call props.onComplete with all collected data on final submit
- All initial values from props (for editing existing profile)
- Use design system CSS variables for all styling

initialProfile.description: Pre-filled profile data for editing (all fields optional)

avatarOptions.description: Available avatar emojis to choose from

roleOptions.description: Available role options for the dropdown

complete.label: Complete Setup
complete.description: Called with all profile data when user completes onboarding

issues.description: The 'Review' step is missing the summary of all selections (specifically missing avatar, notification preference, and theme) requested in the prompt.
issues.fix: Expand the review step to render all fields from the state object in a clear list format.

issues.description: There is no visual transition between steps, making the navigation feel static.
issues.fix: Add a simple CSS transition or animation wrapper to the Card content.

issues.description: Lack of ARIA attributes for step-based navigation (e.g., current step description).
issues.fix: Add a visually hidden or aria-describedby element to indicate which step is currently active for screen readers.

issues.description: Component logic is coupled directly to the UI; no handling for initial props as requested.
issues.fix: Update the initial useState initializer to merge props.properties into the default data object.

evaluations.critique: The component provides a solid foundation with a clean UI and functional state management. It needs better completion of the 'Review' screen to show all captured data and should be updated to accept the initial values passed via props to satisfy the requirement for existing profile editing.
